simple_types.name: Altitude
simple_types.code: type Altitude is delta 0.001 digits 8 range -99_999.999 .. 99_999.999;

simple_types.name: Base_Minute
simple_types.code: type Base_Minute is delta 0.000_000_1 digits 10 range -360.0 .. 360.0;

simple_types.name: Degree
simple_types.code: type Degree is delta 0.01 digits 5 range 0.0 .. 359.99;

simple_types.name: Dilution_Of_Precision
simple_types.code: type Dilution_Of_Precision is delta 0.01 digits 5 range 0.0 .. 100.0;

simple_types.name: NMEA_Message_Kind
simple_types.code:
type NMEA_Message_Kind is
  (GPS_Fixed_Data,
   GPS_Geographic_Position,
   GPS_Active_Satellites,
   GPS_Satellites_In_View,
   GPS_Data_Variant_C,
   GPS_Ground_Speed);

simple_types.name: Parse_Status
simple_types.code: type Parse_Status is (Invalid, Bad_Checksum, No_Checksum, Success);

array_types.name: Satelite_Id_Array
array_types.code: type Satelite_Id_Array is array (Positive range <>) of Satelite_Id;

array_types.name: Satellite_In_View_Array
array_types.code:
type Satellite_In_View_Array is
  array (Positive range <>) of Satellite_In_View;

record_types.name: Active_Satellites

fields.name: Is_Manual
fields.description: Forced to operate in 2D or 3D mode

record_types.name: Data_Variant_C
Date
Fixed_Data

fields.name: Geoid_Separation
fields.description:
The difference between the WGS-84 earth ellipsoid and
mean-sea-level (geoid), "-" means mean-sea-level below
ellipsoid

fields.name: Age_Of_Differential
fields.description:
Age of differential GPS data, time in seconds since last SC104
type 1 or 9 update, 0.0 when DGPS is not used

record_types.name: Geographic_Position
Ground_Speed
Latitude
Longitude
NMEA_Message
Satelite_Id_List
Satellite_In_View
Satellite_In_View_List
Satellites_In_View
Time

subprograms.name: Generic_Parse_Message

documentation.description: Shortcut for Global Positioning System Fixed Data
Shortcut for GPS Geographic Position - Latitude/Longitude
Shortcut for GPS DOP and Active Satellites
Shortcut for GNSS Satellites in View
Shortcut for Recommended Minimum Navigation Information variant C
Shortcut for Course Over Ground and Ground Speed
